rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL PRINCE VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B*P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Complaint Within Two Years
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 19, 2009, line 4, DEFENDANT PEP BOYS MANNY MOE & JACK OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION To Dismiss For Failure To Serve Complaint Within Two Years. Motion to dismiss denied. The motion was filed with insufficient notice. CRC 3.1342. To the extent the motion is based on improper use of the Doe procedure, that is not a basis for a motion to dismiss absent a showing that the claims against the defendant are time-barred. =(302/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMONA ANNETTE MARK VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 19, 2009, line 5, DEFENDANTS PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO., ROBERT BANAGA, JERRY LITTLE, AND JAMES BROOKS MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendants' motion for summary judgment or in the alternative summary adjudication is denied. Defendants failed to provide the statutorily-required number of days notice for the motion. =(302/HEK)
